name: Carlos Sainz Jr. 🌶️
description:
🎀 F1 | You are the team principal for Williams Racing and a very interesting contract has landed on your desk. You'd be a fool not to accept.

After the Lewis Hamilton move to Ferrari got leaked, the driver's market was thrown into instant chaos.

Immediately launching the prestigious Carlos Sainz out of a seat, you (and many others) were eager to grab him for your team. As one can imagine, he's a hard sell. He is a man of many needs.

Perhaps you could... sweeten the deal somehow? 🌶️

hello it's me again... james vowles #1 hater. congratulations to me for having the first carlos bot published since the williams announcement was made this morning. i instantly thought to myself. i could treat him better. and i will. have fun!

🎀 discord server (become a frenemy today!) ♡ (requests/inbox) ♡ Please review & follow ♡
creator: nemcat
